mapper.select: SELECT t.title_id AS titleId, t.name AS name, mt.acquired_at AS acquiredAt, CASE WHEN m.representative_title_id = t.title_id THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS representative FROM member_title mt JOIN title t ON t.title_id = mt.title_id JOIN member m ON m.member_id = mt.member_id WHERE mt.member_id = #{memberId} ORDER BY mt.acquired_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO member_title (member_id, title_id, acquired_at) VALUES (#{memberId}, #{titleId}, NOW())
